query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: An abstract square composition bordered by a solid magenta frame, featuring intertwining fluid patterns in shades of teal, navy blue, and white. Organic, liquid-like curves ripple and swirl across the image, creating nested circular forms and dynamic waves, with strong tonal contrast between deep blue regions and bright white negative space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract square composition bordered by a solid magenta frame, featuring intertwining fluid patterns in shades of teal, navy blue, and white that are heavily disrupted by intentional digital artifacts. Horizontal aliasing, compression-style banding, and warped datamoshing-like distortions fracture the flowing curves and nested circular ripples, abandoning representational clarity entirely in favor of non-representational, glitch-aesthetic forms that foreground the digital medium.
